context: Evaluates implementation of a reverse include dependency graph for MQL files. The candidate must correctly build the graph with case-insensitive normalized keys and perform graph traversal that finds transitive dependencies while handling cycles.

checklist.name: Index key normalization
checklist.description: buildReverseIndex stores entries with keys that are lowercase-normalized paths (using path.normalize + .toLowerCase()), enabling case-insensitive lookup

checklist.name: Multiple includers in Set
checklist.description: When multiple files include the same header, all their paths appear in the Set for that header's key without duplicates

checklist.name: Direct dependency lookup
checklist.description: findCandidateMains returns .mq4/.mq5 files that directly include the queried header

checklist.name: Transitive traversal
checklist.description: findCandidateMains traverses through intermediate .mqh files to find main files that indirectly depend on the queried header

checklist.name: Cycle handling
checklist.description: Uses a visited set to prevent infinite loops when circular include dependencies exist between .mqh files
